command: npm --prefix server test -- report feedback export

pageJumpEvidence.clickPath: O04/O05 API-backed path: generate full -> view full report -> save report -> list my reports
pageJumpEvidence.reason: T05 owns backend report APIs; frontend route rendering and exact clicks are assigned to T11/T12/T15.

decision.summary: Local basic decision for grade-5 math.
lossPoints: Calculation process is incomplete in multi-step questions.
Key formulas are present but final answer checking is weak.
advice: Review mistake categories before the next practice round.
Keep every calculation step visible for teacher review.
decision.upgradeCta: Unlock the complete score improvement report

wrongQuestionCards.title: Missed condition in a multi-step calculation
wrongQuestionCards.originalQuestion: A class has 36 students. Three quarters joined clubs. How many students joined clubs?
wrongQuestionCards.diagnosis: The answer used an incomplete fraction relationship and skipped the condition check.
wrongQuestionCards.explanationSummary: Turn three quarters into 36 x 3 / 4, then verify the result is reasonable.
wrongQuestionCards.aiTeacherCta: Let the AI teacher explain this to the child

wrongQuestionCards.title: Unit conversion omitted in the final answer
wrongQuestionCards.originalQuestion: A rope is 2.4 meters long and is cut into 6 equal pieces. How many centimeters is each piece?
wrongQuestionCards.diagnosis: The calculation found 0.4 meters but did not convert meters to centimeters.
wrongQuestionCards.explanationSummary: First divide meters, then convert 0.4 m to 40 cm before writing the answer.
wrongQuestionCards.aiTeacherCta: Let the AI teacher explain this to the child

decision.summary: Local full report for grade-5 math.

modules.title: Knowledge diagnosis
modules.content: Calculation rules, formula usage, and answer checking need staged practice.

modules.title: Per-question improvement advice
modules.content: Mark the missing condition, write the formula, solve, then verify the unit.

modules.title: 7-day score improvement plan
modules.content: Three short reviews, two targeted exercises, and one full correction review.

modules.title: Parent guidance
modules.content: Focus feedback on process completeness instead of a guaranteed score outcome.
